title: Regional trail closure notice
problemStatement: Visitors need a fast, trustworthy closure notice before they travel, plus a safe alternative when plans change.
audience: Hikers checking conditions before traveling to a trailhead
userGoal: Quickly know whether the trail is open and what safer alternatives exist.
businessGoal: Prevent unsafe travel, reduce call volume, and communicate reopening criteria.

contextDetails.label: Decision needed
contextDetails.value: - [ ] Confirm the closure message and preferred alternative trail.

contextDetails.label: Out of scope
contextDetails.value: Full trail map redesign, weather feeds, and emergency alerts.

contextDetails.label: Contributors
contextDetails.value: Ranger team, parks communications, trail maintenance

items.title: Closure and safe alternative
items.content: The warning and substitute route that help visitors make a safe choice.
annotations: Pair the closure with an alternative so the notice is actionable.

children.title: North Ridge Trail is closed after storm damage
children.content: Downed trees and unstable footing make the upper trail unsafe. Crews are assessing repairs.
annotations: Closure status and reason must be first, especially on mobile.

children.title: Use Meadow Loop for a similar distance
children.content: Meadow Loop is open, 3.1 miles, moderate grade, and accessible from the same parking area.
annotations: Offer a useful next step instead of ending at the warning.

items.title: Check back Friday after 3:00 PM
items.content: The next inspection update will confirm whether partial reopening is possible this weekend.
